title: Sherry Glazed Quinoa Crisp
description: A sweet and crunchy quinoa dish made with a sherry glaze, perfect for a quick snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: Crunchy element (e.g. crushed nuts or seeds)
Sweet element (e.g. honey or maple syrup)

instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
In a small saucepan, combine sherry and sweet element. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine cooked quinoa, sherry glaze, and crunchy element. Mix well to combine.
Transfer mixture to a baking dish and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
